allow: Bash(curl -s -m 15 -u admin:tetra -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120 Firefox/115' -c /tmp/grab_cookies.txt http://172.20.123.1/)

PowerShell(php artisan tinker --no-interaction --execute="$s = new App\\Services\\GrabadorTetraService\(\); var_dump\($s->replayDisponible\(\)\); config\(['grabador.replay_url' => 'http://localhost:9999']\); Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Cache::forget\('grabador_replay_ok_' . md5\('http://localhost:9999'\)\); $s2 = new App\\Services\\GrabadorTetraService\(\); var_dump\($s2->replayDisponible\(\)\);")
PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { 'ffmpeg no esta en PATH' })

PowerShell($t = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Usuario\\.claude\\projects\\C--Apache24-htdocs-dashboard-roles\\0e6d5356-258e-443d-9797-8b1164c16901\\tool-results\\bazk887it.txt"; foreach \($l in $t\) { if \($l -match '^\(Metadatos raiz|getsearchresults|getresults|getmoreresults|nextresults|continueresults|getsearchstatus|gridRows\)'\) { if \($l.Length -gt 400\) { $l.Substring\(0,400\) } else { $l } } })

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:',d.get\('total'\)\); r=d['rows'][0]; print\('keys:',list\(r.keys\(\)\)\); [print\(k,'=',str\(v\)[:120]\) for k,v in r.items\(\) if k!='device_hostname']")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('cpu disponible:', d['disponible'], '| puestos:', len\(d.get\('puestos',[]\)\)\); print\('camaras:', json.dumps\(d['camaras'], ensure_ascii=False\)[:300]\)")

PowerShell($dirs = @\('LARRAMENDI 3520', 'Guido Marizza 1904', 'Dr. Julian Obaid 1618', 'Turi 222', 'Balcar 851', 'Lavallejas al 1883'\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \("https://apis.datos.gob.ar/georef/api/direcciones?direccion=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($d\) + "&provincia=Entre%20R%C3%ADos&max=1"\) -TimeoutSec 10; $item = $r.direcciones | Select-Object -First 1; if \($item\) { Write-Output \("{0} => {1}, {2}" -f $d, $item.ubicacion.lat, $item.ubicacion.lon\) } else { Write-Output \("{0} => SIN RESULTADO" -f $d\) } } catch { Write-Output \("{0} => ERROR {1}" -f $d, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($base='http://193.169.1.246:8088'; try { $st = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$base/status" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("STATUS: " + \($st | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 3\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("STATUS ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; $dirs = @\('Larramendi 3520, Paraná', 'Guido Marizza 1904, Paraná', 'Turi 222, Paraná', 'Balcar 851, Paraná', 'Lavalleja 1883, Paraná', 'Los Jazmines 2635, Paraná'\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \("$base/search?format=json&limit=1&countrycodes=ar&q=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($d\)\) -TimeoutSec 8; if \($r -and $r.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output \("{0} => {1}, {2} | {3}" -f $d, $r[0].lat, $r[0].lon, $r[0].display_name\) } else { Write-Output \("{0} => SIN RESULTADO" -f $d\) } } catch { Write-Output \("{0} => ERROR {1}" -f $d, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($base='http://193.169.1.246:8088'; foreach \($calle in @\('Moussy, Paraná','Ramirez, Paraná'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \("$base/search?format=json&limit=10&polygon_geojson=1&q=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($calle\)\) -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output \("--- {0}: {1} resultados" -f $calle, $r.Count\); foreach \($it in $r\) { Write-Output \("  class={0} type={1} geo={2} pts={3} | {4}" -f $it.class, $it.type, $it.geojson.type, \($it.geojson.coordinates | Measure-Object\).Count, $it.display_name.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(60,$it.display_name.Length\)\)\) } } catch { Write-Output \("{0} => ERROR {1}" -f $calle, $_.Exception.Message\) } })
